ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Continued To Jul-08-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Pursuant To Cal. Code Civ. Proc. 664.6; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFFS BASILIO UDARBE, INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHER SIMILARLY SITUATED PERSONS, JARMILA ROMANOVA, AND BRANDON THIBEAULT's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Pursuant To Cal. Code Civ. Proc. 664.6.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to enforce the settlement agreement is granted as specified herein. There is a strong public policy to encourage the voluntary settlement of litigation. (Osumi v. Sutton (2007) 151 Cal.App.4th 1355, 1359.) On September 18, 2024, this court entered an order granting preliminary approval of a class action settlement between Prema Thekkek and Plaintiffs. That order was entered upon an unopposed motion for preliminary approval which provided the settlement agreement. (Ex. 1 to Dharap Dec.) The Dharap declaration, and the declaration of settlement administrator Taylor Mitzner attached as Exhibit 3 to the Dharap declaration, establish that Thekkek has failed to carry out the settlement. Thekkek is ordered to provide to Mitzner and Plaintiffs a list of names and addresses of employees of Defendants who enrolled in employer-sponsored insurance coverage between January 1, 2019 and September 18, 2024. Thekkek shall provide the list within 30 days of entry of this order. Thekkek is ordered to meet and confer with Plaintiffs' counsel and the settlement administrator to carry out the settlement agreement. Failure to comply with the court's orders may subject Thekkek to sanctions. The court sets July 17, 2025 for final approval hearing.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
